title: Ctrl+Backspace should not delete the preceding space
excerpt: On every other platform, Ctrl+Backspace only removes the previous word, not the space before it. The way Monday’s functions is counterintuitive to every other platform and makes me have to manually go back and add spaces…

posts.author: gregNRE (Greg H)
posts.cookedHtml: On every other platform, Ctrl+Backspace only removes the previous word, not the space before it. The way Monday’s functions is counterintuitive to every other platform and makes me have to manually go back and add spaces constantly between words

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @mgambrell - please let me know if you can reply to this message?

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Let’s see if I can reply to this message.
